mapper.insert: INSERT INTO provider_keys (user_id, provider, enc_key, iv, tag) VALUES (#{userId}, #{provider}, #{encKey}, #{iv}, #{tag}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE enc_key = VALUES(enc_key), iv = VALUES(iv), tag = VALUES(tag), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, provider, enc_key AS encKey, iv, tag FROM provider_keys WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND provider = #{provider}
